The pre-crisis superhero who first appeared as "absorbency boy" but later became known as Earth-Man first appeared in Superboy and the Legion of Super-Heroes #218 (July 1976). He then joined the Legion of Super-Heroes in vol. 6, #2 (August 2010), and later died battling the Adversary in vol. 6, #16 (October 2011). Therefore, the superhero who fits this description is Earth-Man.
